scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @studio/domain && npm run build --workspace @studio/contracts && npm run build --workspace @studio/testing
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @studio/api" "npm run dev --workspace @studio/web"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @studio/web && npm run build --workspace @studio/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && npm run typecheck:e2e
scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run build
